caption: A blonde woman is seated in front of a solid purple background, wearing a black t-shirt with the text "WHO'S IN YOUR" and a graphic below it. She has a small beige headset microphone positioned near her mouth. Across the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing slightly. In the initial moments, she looks toward someone off-screen to her right with a slight smile. She then shifts her gaze forward and slightly downward, her expression becoming more serious. As the sequence continues, she looks back toward the off-screen person, her facial expression softening into a smile while she continues to speak. To her left, the shoulder and arm of another person wearing a grey garment are partially visible, though they remain mostly out of frame throughout the clip.
